mnemonics: DDL Ducks Dig Lakes (Data Definition Language) | DML Ducks Migrate Later (Data Manipulation Language) | DCL Ducks Control Lakes (Data Control Language)
keyPoints: DML manipulates data (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
commonMistakes: Using DROP instead of DELETE (structural vs data removal)
Confusing DDL and DML commands for similar tasks
Granting excessive privileges instead of minimal necessary access
